problems.title: Deals are dispositioned on the contact, not the opportunity
problems.body: Sale outcome and amount are recorded on the contact (or by a workflow), so each new consult overwrites the last and the opportunity — the only record GHL recognizes revenue on — stays empty. Only ~9% of opportunities carry a dollar value.

problems.title: Marketing attribution isn't carried through to win/loss
problems.body: The lead source, UTM and click IDs that drove a deal are never carried onto the opportunity at win or loss, so ad spend can't be tied to Won revenue. Worse, click IDs are captured on essentially zero contacts — attribution is broken at collection.

keystone: Both fixes share one dependency: you cannot recognize revenue OR attribute it while workflow 05 auto-creates $0 A&D "wins." That one workflow corrupts the value field and fires garbage conversions to Meta/Google. Fix 05 first — it unblocks both tracks.
scope_in: Revenue recognition on the opportunity (Value = Total Program Amount, set at Won)
PCC disposition fields on the opportunity (the PCC Sales Data folder)
Fix workflow 05 so SHOWED no longer auto-creates a Won A&D opp
Capture click IDs at the lead forms and stamp source/UTM/click-ID onto the opportunity
Conversions to Meta/Google fire on real Won deals with click IDs
Re-point the few automations that listen for the old A&D-win signal
Optional: historical backfill of existing opportunities

dependencies.title: Rebuild the opportunity sale fields
dependencies.desc: The PCC Sales Data folder (13 fields). Prerequisite for all of Track 1.

dependencies.title: Fix workflow 05 (the keystone)
dependencies.desc: Delete the create-Won-A&D action on SHOWED; set Sale Outcome on the opportunity instead.

dependencies.title: One opportunity per consult
dependencies.desc: Resolve the double-calendar / duplicate-opp issue so each visit has exactly one deal.

dependencies.title: monetaryValue = Total Program Amount
dependencies.desc: Set the deal Value at Won; Won requires value > 0. This is the actual recognition.

dependencies.title: PCCs disposition on the opportunity
dependencies.desc: The form + training + behavior change (the PCC Sales Form mockup).

dependencies.title: Outcome → status mapping
dependencies.desc: Sold→Won, A&D/MUT→Lost+reason, MAR→stays Open. Light workflow or manual.

dependencies.title: Historical backfill (optional)
dependencies.desc: Restate ~7,150 opportunities + split the 992 fake A&D wins. Dry-run first.

dependencies.title: Capture click IDs at the forms
dependencies.desc: gclid/fbclid are on 0 contacts today — fix the inbound webhook / forms so they're captured. The dependency everyone underestimates.

dependencies.title: Stamp source/UTM/click-ID onto the opportunity
dependencies.desc: Small workflow at opp creation so the deal carries its attribution.

dependencies.title: Retain source through win/loss
dependencies.desc: Automatic once D9 is in place — the opp keeps its source to Won/Lost.

dependencies.title: Conversions fire on real Won + click IDs
dependencies.desc: Closes the loop to Meta/Google. Needs the 05 fix (D2) and capture (D8).

fields.name: Pay Type
fields.opts: PIF / SF / CARE / MAG / Cash / Card

fields.name: A&D Reason
fields.opts: Not Ready / Think it Over / Cost / Not Interested / Not Qualified / Others

trigger_map.today: Fires 05 (creates A&D Won), 06 (price calc), 07 (post-visit/review opp) all at once.
trigger_map.planb: Keep the SHOWED signal. 05 sets Sale Outcome instead of creating a Won A&D. Re-point 06/07 to read the opportunity outcome, not the A&D win.

trigger_map.today: Fires CAPI → Meta and Google Ads conversions — including on the fake A&D wins.
trigger_map.planb: Fire conversions on real Won (status=won, value>0) with gclid/fbclid attached. No conversions on A&D/No-Sale/Lost.

trigger_map.today: 01A–E capture source but click IDs land on 0 contacts.
trigger_map.planb: Confirm the webhook passes gclid/fbclid; write to contact AND stamp onto the opportunity at create (D9).

migration.constraint: Sale data on the contact is a single value set that overwrote every time a patient consulted again. So the contact only holds the LATEST deal per patient — repeat patients' earlier deals are already gone. You can restate the most recent deal cleanly; for older ones you keep the opportunity shell (date, stage) but the sale detail is unrecoverable. Migration can't undo overwrites that already happened.

steps.title: Pick the target opportunity
steps.body: Match the contact's latest sale to the most recent real opp by consult date. A contact often has a real sales-pipeline opp AND fake A&D win(s) — target the right one.

steps.title: Evidence-split the 992 A&D wins
steps.body: value > 0 or contact Sale Outcome = Sold → real Won; else $0 → Lost. This un-inflates the win rate while preserving real revenue.

steps.title: Translate values
steps.body: Build the new opp dropdowns with the contact's exact options so most fields copy 1:1. Two need a mapping table: products (Semaglutide/Tirzepatide → GLP1, THRT → HRT) and pay type (Magwitch → MAG, SFC → SF, CARECredit → CARE).

steps.title: The 80/20
steps.body: total_program_amount → opportunity monetaryValue on real Won deals is what makes revenue reports true. Product/term/price/pay are secondary analytics.

steps.title: Write safely
steps.body: Dry-run produces a CSV of every proposed change → human review (spot-check ≥20 rows incl. both A&D splits) → idempotent, batched write → reconcile Σ revenue before = after.

tooling.name: Custom migration script + staging DB
tooling.note: Python/Node over the GHL API with a SQLite staging layer. Stages every proposed change, dry-run CSV, evidence-split, idempotent batched write, full reconciliation + a rollback baseline. Auditable and re-runnable — the opposite of hand-editing.

tooling.name: iPaaS — Make.com / Zapier / n8n
tooling.note: Fine for the simple ongoing copy if you'd rather not use a GHL workflow. Weak for the one-time bulk (rate limits, no reconciliation or evidence-splitting).

tooling.name: Spreadsheet review (Google Sheets)
tooling.note: The dry-run CSV opens here; you approve before anything writes to live data.

tooling.name: GHL native (Smart Lists / workflow update-opportunity)
tooling.note: A workflow can copy a contact field → opp field going forward, but it's clumsy for historical bulk with evidence-splitting.

migration.deps: D1 fields built (with contact-matching options) · D2 workflow 05 fixed · D3 one opp per consult · evidence-split rules + product/pay-type translation tables approved
migration.decision: How far back — restate all recoverable history, or just recent/active deals? Older overwritten data has little recoverable value.

backfill.question: Backfill is the single biggest size lever in Plan B.

goforward.title: Go-forward only
goforward.desc: Fix capture + 05 + fields now; new deals are clean from day one. Fastest. But historical revenue and win rate stay wrong until you choose to restate.

restate.title: Full restatement
restate.desc: Also backfill ~7,150 existing opportunities: split the 992 fake A&D wins (real Won vs $0 no-sale), set monetaryValue from the contact data. Idempotent, dry-run first, reconciled Σ before = after.

phases.title: Instrument + snapshot
phases.do: Revenue-integrity monitor (running) + full export as the rollback baseline.

phases.title: Additive build (parallel, safe)
phases.do: D1 rebuild PCC Sales Data fields  ‖  D8 fix click-ID capture at the forms.
phases.gate: Fields verified; a test lead shows gclid/fbclid captured

phases.title: Keystone changes (behind canary)
phases.do: D2 fix 05  +  D9 attribution stamp  +  D6 outcome→status, on the src:bf-web canary cohort.
phases.gate: SHOWED never creates a Won A&D; won-with-$0 trends to 0

phases.title: PCC go-live
phases.do: D5 train PCCs to disposition on the opportunity; widen from canary to all.
phases.gate: Reps entering outcome+value on the opp; values appearing

phases.title: Close the ad-platform loop
phases.do: D11 verify CAPI/Google fire on real Won with click IDs; no fires on A&D.
phases.gate: Conversions match real wins for 5 days

phases.title: Backfill (optional)
phases.do: D7 dry-run → review CSV → write. Go-forward-only skips this.
phases.gate: Σ revenue reconciles to approved CSV
